name: Mango Papaya Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 mangoes, peeled, seeded, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 medium to 3 medium papayas, peeled, seeded, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh peeled ginger
2 teaspoons finely chopped fresh hot chillies
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the fruits to yield 7 cups. Place in a large cooking pot.
2. Add vinegar; bring to boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat, simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients; simmer for about one hour, until mango is tender, stirring occasionally.
5. Transfer chutney to a bowl; cover and refrigerate. Store for 2-3 days before using. For longer storage, ladle into hot sterilized jars with lids and store in cool dark place.
